name: CyberBrick
short_description: CyberBrick presents classic brick breaker arcade action in a new re-imagined unique game where the better you are at staying cool and composed, the more points you will likely score. Offers 100% Mouse controller gameplay!
detailed_description:
CyberBrick brings the classic brick breaking action games of the 1980s and 1990s into the modern era with plenty of frantic fun, wild chaos, and plain ol' good times to the max!

*  100% Mouse controlled action makes playing as user-friendly as possible, however should you desire to play with your keyboard or controller, those options are available as well!

* Points are scored more by catching gems that fall from the broken bricks than simply breaking the bricks from afar.

* Bricks sporadically drop both positive and negative power-ups and de-buffs and it's up to you to learn what drops do what.

* Excellent play earns you extra balls that multiply your score exponentially!

* Rewarding gameplay ensures a high replay value that will likely have you playing again and again!

* An included level editor allows you to use every color bricks and create your own custom levels to play!

- You can even submit the levels you design for official inclusion in the game for all players to play!

...Take a screenshot of the levels you want to submit and submit them on the CyberBrick discord thread HERE:

* More features, gameplay modes, levels, and game mechanics will be released over time as more and more players play the game.

* JUST ONE EXAMPLE OF A LEVEL MADE WITH THE LEVEL EDITOR INSIDE THE GAME:
